titleStmt.title: SII 28.233: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 233. (A.R. No. 388 of 1913.)

summary.p: Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, west wall.

The latter portion of the record is lost. It records the sale of land in two plots for a consideration of 10 kāśu to Chaṇḍēśvarar (the divine secretary of the God) in the Śiṟuttirukkōyil in Uṟumūr, a dēvadāna-brahmadēyam in Nalvēḷūrkūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai-Rājēndrasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu by the sabhā of Ūṟumūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī* . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac
celviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai
maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟutta
ruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyu
n taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamu
ṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻ Īḻamaṇṭalamum
Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi ta
ṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷellā yāṇ
ṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyaraittecu
koḷ śrīgorājarājagesarivanmarāna śrīrājarāja devaṟ
ku yāṇṭu Irupattumuṉṟāvatu vaṭakarai rājendrasiṁha
vaḷanāṭṭu nalvelūrkkūṟṟattut tevatāṉa brahmateya
m Uṟumurc ciṟuttirukkoyil śaṇḍeśvararkku viṟṟa ni
lam sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam śrīarumoḻip
pereri kiḻ Erikkilaṅkollai Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭu nilattu
kku kiḻpāṟkellai Erivākkālukku meṟku teṉpāṟkel
lai Āṉāṟṟukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai kamukukoḷikku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai Āṉāṟṟukkut teṟkkum Innāṉkellaiyilu maka
ppaṭṭa nilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvum Itaṉkiḻai Aiyyāṟu te
vaṉeṉṟu per kūvappaṭu nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Erivākkālukku me
[ṟkkum t] Eṉpāṟkellai Ūrppuṟattāḷ koyilukku vaṭakkum melpāṟke
llai Erivākkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṉāṟṟukkut teṟkum
Innāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭu māvum Āka Iraṇṭu kiṭak
kaiyālum nilam veli veliyum viṟṟuk koṇṭa vilaip poruṭ kācu mā
ttāl kācu Arai Ākakkācu pattuṅkoṇṭu veli nilamum viṟṟukkuṭu
ttom ciṟuttirukkoyil śaṇḍeśvararkku Uṟumur sabhai yom
Innilam velikkum Iṟai yeccoṟu vācalilpontakuṭi
maiyum Ūriṭuvarippāṭu Epperppaṭṭatum Iṟuppataṟku śaContinuation lost.
Two more pieces in the same place in later characters which together read as follows:

Ippaṭi A
ṟiveṉ vaḷa
vaṉ māte
viccaruppe
timaṅka
lattu karaṇattāṉ śrīkṛṣṇaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭai
yāṉāna Uttamappiriyanen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai
yeṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ivvūr veṇṇaikkuṟiccik kāḷai
Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ śrīmaturāntakaccerik kārampicceṭṭu nāraciṅ
ḷaṉ Akkāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉeṉ Innilatti po kuṭi tāṅki viḷākam
Digital edition of SII 28.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
